name: Gold Medal Cheddar-Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
Large Loaf:
1 cup + 2 tablespoons Water
3 cups Bread Flour
1 1/4 cups Shredded Sharp Cheddar Cheese
1 1/2 tablespoons Sugar
3/4 teaspoon Salt
1 1/4 teaspoons Active Dry Yeast, Quick-acting
3/4 cup Small Pimiento-Stuffed Olives, Drained
Measure all ingredients except olives into the bread machine pan in the order that the bread machine manufacturer suggests. Add olives at the time of the raisin/nut beep or 5 to 10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends. Select regular or rapid bake cycle. Do not use the delayed bake cycle. Remove baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
